---
title: "Home"
output: html_document
---

<div class="intro-box">

# Zifan Ye

MPH student in Epidemiology at Emory Rollins School of Public Health with interests in public health research, data analysis, and health communication.

This website highlights my academic background, selected graduate-level projects, and professional materials.

</div>

## About Me

I am interested in epidemiology, public health, and data visualization. My work focuses on using data to answer applied health questions and communicate findings clearly to different audiences.

## Current Interests

- Epidemiology and public health
- Data visualization and reproducible research
- Health outcomes and program evaluation
- Clinical and population health research
